title: Youtube Abridged Poop: Surprise Buttsecks
description:
Abridged Series of Yugioh.

Watch it, learn it, do other arousingly-oriented things with it.

What'd I do with it here? Make a crappy poop.

Oh yeah, I forgot to mention the clips in the crappy credits.

YGO abridged ep. 31, and its other movie.
